GET STARTED WITH BUNDLES

We make the food. You choose how to get it. Build your own selection of lunches and more, or, if you want to get started quickly, just select one of our bundles. Swap in and out products for the following week, and forever after, with unlimited anytime edits. Get started now!

“TYME’s food is f*cking delicious.”

“Sad desk lunch no more”

“It’s radical.“

PIONEERING RECIPES

Using the science of plant-based nutrition and testing recipes over 10 years and 550+ trials. TYME lunches are designed for taste. Not just that, they're packed with plant fibres to give you all the nutrients you need. Reducing the feeling of hunger, and increasing energy throughout the working day.

4-5 PLANT-BASED FIBRES RECOMMENDED PER DAY

12+ PLANT-BASED FIBRES PER 1 LUNCH

Scientists recommend eating 30 different types of plant based fibre in a full week to maintain a healthy gut microbiome.

12 COMPLETE LUNCHES + MUCH MORE...

Our much-loved originals are always available. Not tried them yet? Now is the time. Alongside TYME lunches, we've created snacks, breakfasts, shots, and smoothies designed to work with the lunches to provide you with everything needed to stay energized through the workday.
